title: Namokar Mantra listening guide
meaning_en: A safe listening note for families who want to begin with the Namokar Mantra and understand its calm devotional role.
meaning_hi: परिवारों के लिए नमोकार मंत्र के शांत भक्तिमय महत्व को समझने हेतु एक सुरक्षित श्रवण नोट।
attribution_text: Metadata-only devotional audio reference. No lyrics or hosted audio are published without permission review.
review_notes: Audio permissions and reuse rights must be verified before any broader embedding or hosting.

title: Bhaktamar Stotra introduction
